query:
-- Cull all non-sales-relevant manual pending contacts (with or without email)
-- Keeping: Maintenance, Engineering, Management, Purchasing, Production, Quality assurance, R&D, Sales, Service Department, Health & Safety
-- Culling: Finance, CRM Contact, Service Operations, Administration, Sales & Marketing, Logistics, Service Purchase, HR, Legal, Department, IT
UPDATE contacts 
SET enrichmentStatus = 'not_found',
    enrichedAt = NOW()
WHERE enrichmentSource = 'manual'
  AND enrichmentStatus = 'pending'
  AND title IN (
    'Finance', 'CRM Contact', 'Invoice via Email', 'Collections Contact', 
    'IT', 'Administration', 'Logistics', 'Development',
    'Service Operations', 'Service Purchase',
    'Sales & Marketing', 'HR', 'Legal', 'Department', 'Health & Safety'
  );
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
-- Cull all non-sales-relevant manual pending contacts (with or without email)
-- Keeping: Maintenance, Engineering, Management, Purchasing, Production, Quality assurance, R&D, Sales, Service Department, Health & Safety
-- Culling: Finance, CRM Contact, Service Operations, Administration, Sales & Marketing, Logistics, Service Purchase, HR, Legal, Department, IT
UPDATE contacts 
SET enrichmentStatus = 'not_found',
    enrichedAt = NOW()
WHERE enrichmentSource = 'manual'
  AND enrichmentStatus = 'pending'
  AND title IN (
    'Finance', 'CRM Contact', 'Invoice via Email', 'Collections Contact', 
    'IT', 'Administration', 'Logistics', 'Development',
    'Service Operations', 'Service Purchase',
    'Sales & Marketing', 'HR', 'Legal', 'Department', 'Health & Safety'
  );
